selected_issue.title: Automation operator docs used outdated run-branch and report filename conventions that conflicted with the active fast-lane contract

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Current evidence shows no unresolved rank 1-6 issues: structural violations are zero, canonical tests pass, replay mismatch is not confirmed, diagnostic invariant totals are zero, and no blocking instrumentation/calibration signal was found in canonical checks. Therefore the highest unresolved bounded issue is rank-7 documentation contract drift.

checks: rg contract-gap probe showed legacy agent/run and report-YYYYMMDD naming in automation/README.md and automation/FIRST_RUN_OPERATOR_GUIDE.md

files_changed.change: Updated run-branch naming format/example to fast lane contract.
Updated run-branch naming and report artifact filename convention to branch-stem .md/.json paths.

validation_performed.result: Expected matches found in updated docs and templates

before_after_evidence.before: README/operator guide contained legacy agent/run branch naming and legacy single-file report naming format.
before_after_evidence.after: README/operator guide now specify fast/run-YYYYMMDD-HHMM-short-slug and branch-stem-based markdown/json report paths.

unresolved_risks: Other historical docs outside these two operator docs may still include legacy branch examples.
stop_reason: Selected single rank-7 contract-drift issue was fixed with minimal bounded doc edits and validated; broader documentation harmonization is out of scope for this run.
